---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem / Need

Describe the problem or unmet need this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you'd like this to work.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you've thought about and why they fall short.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that help explain the request.
